name_en: Chanel 25C LP Handle Cosmetic Box Bag [Color]
name_cn:
Chanel 25C LP Handle Cosmetic Box Bag [Color]
A very classic and durable shape [Happy][Happy]. The capacity is also very large [Sun]. Easily fits two large phones [Love][Love]. The shoulder strap can be freely removed! Highly recommended [Sun]
Material: Haas Small Calfskin
Dimensions: 19.5 × 17 × 5 cm
Model: A
